sanskrit:
उदाराः सर्व एवैते ज्ञानी त्वात्मैव मे मतम्।
आस्थितः स हि युक्तात्मा मामेवानुत्तमां गतिम्॥
transliteration: udārāḥ sarva evaite jñānī tv ātmaiva me matam | āsthitaḥ sa hi yuktātmā mām evānuttamāṃ gatim ||
literal_meaning: All these are indeed magnanimous; the knower, however, is My very Self—so I hold. Established [in Me], that integrated soul certainly attains Me, the unsurpassed goal.
contextual_meaning: Krishna affirms that every seeker who approaches him—whether for relief, gain, or love—is noble. Yet the one whose identity has merged with the Divine through knowledge and unbroken devotion is no longer a separate lover but an extension of the Beloved himself.
psychological_state: Secure attachment to the Divine; ego boundaries soften into participatory identity; intrinsic motivation replaces transactional faith.
trigger_scenario: A team member who once volunteered for résumé points now stays late because the mission feels like personal purpose—then realizes the organization’s vision has become her own.
anchor_text: Know yourself as the Divine and you become the Divine.
